title: Group Designation when submitting form submission
excerpt: Is there a way to select which group you want your form submission to go too?

posts.author: Ariesence (Laketa Kinya Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to select which group you want your form submission to go too?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
On a per submission basis? Not automatically, but you could have a status and an automation that moves it based on status when an item is created.

Now if you want all submissions to go to a particular group, in the form settings there is an option (in Workforms its in monday.com settings) for which group answers go to.
